summary.para: A clickable dropdown used with EditorToolbarElementAttribute.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarDropdown.#ctor

summary.para: Constructor.

member.param: Action triggered when the button is clicked. Usually opens a window or a dropdown menu through the use of GenericMenu.

The text associated with the element.

summary.para: Allow to set a value without being notified of the change, if any.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarDropdownToggle.ShowDropDown(System.Boolean)

summary.para: Allow to set the visibility of the drop down button.

member.param: True if the dropdown is visible, false otherwise.

summary.para: A float field used with EditorToolbarElementAttribute.
Creates a float field visual element that is styled to match a toolbar in an UnityEditor.Overlays.Overlay.
A clickable slider used with EditorToolbarElementAttribute.
The icon associated with the slider.
The text associated with the slider.
USS Class Name used to style the EditorToolbarSlider.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarSlider.#ctor

summary.para: Constructor for the EditorToolbarSlider.

member.param: The text associated with the slider.
The start value of the slider, it has to be lower than the end value.
The end value of the slider, it has to be higher than the start value.
The icon associated with the slider.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarSlider.#ctor(System.String,System.Single,System.Single)

summary.para: Constructor for the EditorToolbarSlider.

member.param: The text associated with the slider.
The start value of the slider, it has to be lower than the end value.
The end value of the slider, it has to be higher than the start value.
The icon associated with the slider.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarSlider.#ctor(UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Single,System.Single)

summary.para: Constructor for the EditorToolbarSlider.

member.param: The text associated with the slider.
The start value of the slider, it has to be lower than the end value.
The end value of the slider, it has to be higher than the start value.
The icon associated with the slider.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarSlider.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Single,System.Single)

summary.para: Constructor for the EditorToolbarSlider.

member.param: The text associated with the slider.
The start value of the slider, it has to be lower than the end value.
The end value of the slider, it has to be higher than the start value.
The icon associated with the slider.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarSlider.SetValueWithoutNotify(System.Single)

summary.para: Allow to set a value without being notified of the change, if any.

member.param: The new value for the slider.

summary.para: A toggle displayed as a button. Mainly used inside an Overlay or with EditorToolbarElementAttribute.
The icon associated with the toggle.
The icon associated with the toggle when the value is false.
The icon associated with the toggle when the value is true.
The text associated with the toggle.
The text icon associated with the toggle.
USS Class Name used to style the EditorToolbarToggle.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarToggle.#ctor

summary.para: Constructor.

member.param: The text associated with the toggle.
The icon associated with the toggle.
The icon associated with the toggle when the value is true.
The icon associated with the toggle when the value is false.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarToggle.#ctor(System.String)

summary.para: Constructor.

member.param: The text associated with the toggle.
The icon associated with the toggle.

The icon associated with the toggle when the value is false.

member.param: The text associated with the toggle.

The icon associated with the toggle when the value is false.

member.param: The text associated with the toggle.
The icon associated with the toggle.
The icon associated with the toggle when the value is true.
The icon associated with the toggle when the value is false.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.EditorToolbarToggle.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEngine.Texture2D)

member.param: The text associated with the toggle.

summary.para: Allow to set a value without being notified of the change, if any.
Describes the content and behaviour of a button element for the main toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarButton.#ctor(UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarContent,System.Action)

summary.para: Specify the content and function of a main toolbar button.

member.param: The visual content for this button.
The action to perform when the user selects the button.

summary.para: Describes the content and behaviour of a dropdown element for the main toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarDropdown.#ctor(UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarContent,System.Action`1<UnityEngine.Rect>)

summary.para: Specify the content and function of a main toolbar dropdown.

member.param: The visual content for this button.
The callback that Unity invokes when the user selects the dropdown. Unity provides the `rect` where the dropdown appears as a parameter.

summary.para: A label element for the main toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarLabel.#ctor(UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarContent)

summary.para: Specifies the content of a main toolbar label.

member.param: The visual content for this label.

summary.para: A slider element for the main toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarSlider.#ctor(UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarContent,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Action`1<System.Single>)

summary.para: Specify the content and function of a main toolbar slider.

member.param: The visual content of the slider.
The default value of the slider.
The start value of the slider, it must be lower than the end value.
The end value of the slider, it must to be higher than the end value.
Set to true if the slider should only have values rounded to the closest int value.
The callback that receives the new value of the slider when the user changes it.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarSlider.#ctor(UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarContent,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Action`1<System.Single>,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Specify the content and function of a main toolbar slider.

member.param: The visual content of the slider.
The default value of the slider.
The start value of the slider, it must be lower than the end value.
The end value of the slider, it must to be higher than the end value.
Set to true if the slider should only have values rounded to the closest int value.
The callback that receives the new value of the slider when the user changes it.

summary.para: Describes the content and behaviour of a toggle element for the main toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarToggle.#ctor(UnityEditor.Toolbars.MainToolbarContent,System.Boolean,System.Action`1<System.Boolean>)

summary.para: Specify the content and function of a main toolbar toggle.

member.param: The visual content of the toggle.
The state of the toggle:`On` or `Off`.
The callback that receives the new state of the toggle when the user selects it.
